product.name: HORIMOTE HOME 100% Cotton Quilt Set Queen Size, Light Grey Pre-Washed Bedspread Coverlet Set, Cozy Lightweight Stitching Decorative Bedding Cover with 2 Shams in Geometric Pattern for All Season
features: Full/Queen Size Included: 1 PCS Bedspread 90" x 96", 2 PCS Pillowshams 20" x 26"

Premium Material: Our 3-piece quilt set is made from 100% cotton, which is skin-friendly and breathable for indescribably comfy feel! Stitching geometric pattern adds design and beauty to the solid color quilt
Unique Technology: Enzyme washing process increases the comfortability and softness of the 100% cotton quilt. This quilt is wrinkle and shrink resistant.

Practical& Distinctive: Combined traditional utility with modern simple appearance, this multipurpose coverlet set is a good decoration as quilt, bedspread, comforter set, blanket and bed cover. Reversible side helps you get rid of finding the front or back side
Easy Care: Machine wash separately in cold water (under 86℉) on the gentle cycle. Tumble dry in low heat to keep it soft and colorful
